description: Vegeta's sudden arrival creates an opening for the others to rescue Goku. While Yamcha rushes the fallen hero to safety, Vegeta reveals his new and improved fighting style - including the Big Bang Attack!

input: No Victory for Android 19! Enter Super Vegeta!
Victory for Android 19! Enter Super Vegeta!

title: No Victory for Android 19! Enter Super Vegeta!

description: In the aftermath of battle, Dende heals the injured heroes and summons the magic Dragon Balls in an attempt to resurrect those killed during Cell's rampage!

input: A Bittersweet Victory! Until We Meet Again!
Bittersweet Victory! Until We Meet Again!

title: A Bittersweet Victory! Until We Meet Again!

description: To prove himself worthy of King Kai's training, Goku must test his mettle against a fleet-footed monkey and a powerful cricket that's big on respect. Meanwhile, in the land of the living, Gohan takes a beating from his monstrous master!

input: The Battle with Ten-Times Gravity! Goku's Race Against the Clock!
Battle with Ten-Times Gravity! Goku's Race Against the Clock!
with Ten-Times Gravity! Goku's Race Against the Clock!
Ten-Times Gravity! Goku's Race Against the Clock!
Gravity! Goku's Race Against the Clock!

title: The Battle with Ten-Times Gravity! Goku's Race Against the Clock!

description: The Super Namekian formerly known as Piccolo finds himself face-to-face with the most terrifying monster the world has ever seen. Who is this new threat? And why does he have Goku's power?

input: I Am Your Brother! The Monster with Goku's Energy!
Am Your Brother! The Monster with Goku's Energy!
Your Brother! The Monster with Goku's Energy!
Brother! The Monster with Goku's Energy!

title: I Am Your Brother! The Monster with Goku's Energy!

description: Vegeta lays it on the line in a daring attempt to steal the Dragon Balls right out from under Frieza's nose. Krillin's riding high on a Namekian power surge, but he's about to wander into a dogfight he can't survive!

input: The Scheme is Shattered! Vegeta Strikes Back at Zarbon!
Scheme is Shattered! Vegeta Strikes Back at Zarbon!
is Shattered! Vegeta Strikes Back at Zarbon!
Shattered! Vegeta Strikes Back at Zarbon!

title: The Scheme is Shattered! Vegeta Strikes Back at Zarbon!

description: Goku arrives at the battle scene only to find Vegeta battered and badly beaten. With his dying breath, the Saiyan prince reveals the truth about Frieza's roll in the death of Goku's father, prompting a fierce outburst of Saiyan pride!

input: Defeat Frieza, Goku! The Tears of the Proud Saiyan Prince!
Frieza, Goku! The Tears of the Proud Saiyan Prince!
Goku! The Tears of the Proud Saiyan Prince!
The Tears of the Proud Saiyan Prince!
Tears of the Proud Saiyan Prince!

title: Defeat Frieza, Goku! The Tears of the Proud Saiyan Prince!

description: At long last, Goku finally completes his journey from Earth and arrives on planet Namek. His friends are gravely injured, but the mighty Saiyan warrior has a bag full of magic beans and a powerful secret!

input: Goku Arrives at Last! Take Down the Ginyu Force!
Arrives at Last! Take Down the Ginyu Force!
at Last! Take Down the Ginyu Force!
Last! Take Down the Ginyu Force!

title: Goku Arrives at Last! Take Down the Ginyu Force!

description: Intimidated by Vegeta's superior strength, Krillin reluctantly surrenders his precious Dragon Ball.  A glimmer of hope remains after Gohan secures a ball of his own - but the young warrior is headed for a beat-down courtesy of Vegeta!

input: A Touch-and-Go Situation! Gohan, Protect the Four Star Ball!
Touch-and-Go Situation! Gohan, Protect the Four Star Ball!
Situation! Gohan, Protect the Four Star Ball!
Gohan, Protect the Four Star Ball!

title: A Touch-and-Go Situation! Gohan, Protect the Four Star Ball!

description: Gohan and Krillin risk their lives to rescue a young Namekian, and Vegeta goes on the rampage after learning the truth about the destruction of his home planet!

input: Dodoria's Terrifying Chase! A Truth Revealed to Vegeta!
Terrifying Chase! A Truth Revealed to Vegeta!
Chase! A Truth Revealed to Vegeta!

title: Dodoria's Terrifying Chase! A Truth Revealed to Vegeta!

description: Gohan and Krillin beat up on Frieza's henchmen, but their spaceship is destroyed in the process. Vegeta is headed for a showdown with Cui, and the shrewd Saiyan is keeping his true power level under wraps!

input: The Rebellion Against Frieza! Vegeta's Burning Ambition!
Rebellion Against Frieza! Vegeta's Burning Ambition!

title: The Rebellion Against Frieza! Vegeta's Burning Ambition!

description: The eldest Namekian unlocks the full force of Krillin's dormant power, so the bald brawler can better protect his Dragon Ball. Elsewhere, a Saiyan-related premonition prompts Frieze to call for reinforcements.

input: Power Up, Krillin! Frieza's Mounting Apprehension!

title: Power Up, Krillin! Frieza's Mounting Apprehension!

description: One by one, Vegeta and his reluctant allies meet horrific ends at the hands of the unstoppable Androids. A bed-stricken Goku is Earth's only hope, but there's a specially-designed Android waiting to destroy him!

input: A Sweet Face and Super Power? Android 18 vs. Vegeta!
Sweet Face and Super Power? Android 18 vs. Vegeta!
Face and Super Power? Android 18 vs. Vegeta!
and Super Power? Android 18 vs. Vegeta!

title: A Sweet Face and Super Power? Android 18 vs. Vegeta!

description: Frieza locates the Eldest Namekian, but Nail intercepts the evil entity, risking his own life to preserve the Dragon Balls. Elsewhere, Gohan and Krillin rescue a damsel from some dinosaurs, and Goku continues his battle with Captain Ginyu.

input: Full Power, Goku! Captain Ginyu's Desperate Attack!
Power, Goku! Captain Ginyu's Desperate Attack!

title: Full Power, Goku! Captain Ginyu's Desperate Attack!

description: Vegeta intercepts Krillin and Gohan on their mad dash to get powered up by the Eldest Namekian, but larger problems loom on the horizon. Brace yourselves for the arrival of the Ginyu Force!

input: The Countdown to Battle Begins! Enter, the Ginyu Force!
Countdown to Battle Begins! Enter, the Ginyu Force!
to Battle Begins! Enter, the Ginyu Force!
Battle Begins! Enter, the Ginyu Force!

title: The Countdown to Battle Begins! Enter, the Ginyu Force!

description: Cell returns with intentions to wipe out planet Earth once and for all! Gohan is badly injured, but with a little help from his friends - and pep talk from his fallen father - he summons a Kamehameha Wave that just might save the world!

input: Combine Your Strength! The Final Kamehame-Ha!

title: Combine Your Strength! The Final Kamehame-Ha!

description: Goku leads his Saiyan brethren to a secret room designed for highly-advanced training. Meanwhile, Piccolo puts his enhanced powers to the test against an Android adversary!

input: Break the Super Saiyan Barrier! Into the Hyperbolic Time Chamber!
the Super Saiyan Barrier! Into the Hyperbolic Time Chamber!
Super Saiyan Barrier! Into the Hyperbolic Time Chamber!
Saiyan Barrier! Into the Hyperbolic Time Chamber!
Barrier! Into the Hyperbolic Time Chamber!

title: Break the Super Saiyan Barrier! Into the Hyperbolic Time Chamber!

description: Goku blasts off in a brand new spaceship specially equipped with a device designed to help increase his strength! On Namek, Krillin and Gohan watch in horror as Frieza's men slaughter innocent Namekians.

input: Protect the Dragon Balls! The Namekians' All-Out Attack!
the Dragon Balls! The Namekians' All-Out Attack!
Dragon Balls! The Namekians' All-Out Attack!

title: Protect the Dragon Balls! The Namekians' All-Out Attack!

description: Piccolo hatches a desperate plan to prolong the battle until Goku's arrival. When Vegeta senses an awesome source of power approaching, he orders Nappa to dispose of remaining Z-Fighters - starting with Gohan!

input: Will Goku Make it in Time?! Three Hours Until the Battle Resumes!
Goku Make it in Time?! Three Hours Until the Battle Resumes!
Make it in Time?! Three Hours Until the Battle Resumes!
it in Time?! Three Hours Until the Battle Resumes!
in Time?! Three Hours Until the Battle Resumes!
Time?! Three Hours Until the Battle Resumes!
Three Hours Until the Battle Resumes!

title: Will Goku Make it in Time?! Three Hours Until the Battle Resumes!

description: When his most powerful attacks fail to faze Frieza, Goku turns to his ultimate weapon: the Spirit Bomb! Piccolo joins the fight to buy Goku some time, but can the noble Namekian survive long enough to taste sweet victory?

input: The Final Trump Card! Goku's Ultimate Spirit Bomb!
Final Trump Card! Goku's Ultimate Spirit Bomb!
Trump Card! Goku's Ultimate Spirit Bomb!

title: The Final Trump Card! Goku's Ultimate Spirit Bomb!

description: Trunks returns to the future to settle unfinished business with the remaining androids and the monstrous Cell. Elsewhere, Goku adjusts to his new surroundings by looking for a fight!

input: Peace for the Future! The Spirit of Goku is Forever!
for the Future! The Spirit of Goku is Forever!
the Future! The Spirit of Goku is Forever!
Future! The Spirit of Goku is Forever!
The Spirit of Goku is Forever!

title: Peace for the Future! The Spirit of Goku is Forever!

description: As Frieza prepares for his ruthless interrogation of the Eldest Namekian, Goku shows off the benefits of training in gravity one hundred times that of Earth. Will it be enough to help him defeat Captain Ginyu?

input: The Star Player Appears! Ginyu vs. Goku!
Star Player Appears! Ginyu vs. Goku!

title: The Star Player Appears! Ginyu vs. Goku!

description: Gohan and Krillin - with the aid of the young Namekian Dende - rush to make their wishes before Vegeta or Frieza discover their trickery. When the dragon is unable to grant their request, a departed ally offers advice from the afterlife.

input: Frieza Closes In! Mighty Porunga, Grant Our Wish!
Closes In! Mighty Porunga, Grant Our Wish!
In! Mighty Porunga, Grant Our Wish!

title: Frieza Closes In! Mighty Porunga, Grant Our Wish!

description: Goku is a legendary warrior and the strongest fighter on the planet, but he's about to encounter a foe from out-of-this-world. What brings this new menace to Earth? And what's up with his tail?

input: Prologue to Battle! The Return of Goku!
to Battle! The Return of Goku!

title: Prologue to Battle! The Return of Goku!

description: Krillin's furious attack wipes out the Saibamen, but the Z-Fighters are powerless against the Saiyan warlords. One by one, Earth's defenders suffer devastating injuries - or fall in battle. Goku's return is their only hope for survival.

input: Sit Tight, Chiaotzu! Tien's Screaming Tri-Beam!

title: Sit Tight, Chiaotzu! Tien's Screaming Tri-Beam!

description: Krillin and Gohan team up to blast Vegeta with a Spirit Bomb, but the Saiyan prince refuses to die. Things look bad for the Z-Fighters until Yajirobe distracts the enemy long enough for Gohan to undergo a transformation of his own!

input: Defeat the Invincible Vegeta! Work a Miracle, Gohan!
the Invincible Vegeta! Work a Miracle, Gohan!
Invincible Vegeta! Work a Miracle, Gohan!

title: Defeat the Invincible Vegeta! Work a Miracle, Gohan!

description: After defeating Piccolo, Cell turns his attention to his true prey: Androids 17 and 18. The monster must absorb them both to achieve his perfect form, but Android 16 still stands in his way!

input: Power Unknown! Android 16 Breaks His Silence!

title: Power Unknown! Android 16 Breaks His Silence!

description: As the deadly Saiyan invaders approach Earth, Gohan makes slow, but steady, progress under the watchful eye of Piccolo, and Goku struggles with the "gravity" of his training under King Kai.

input: The End of Snake Way! King Kai's Bizarre Test!
End of Snake Way! King Kai's Bizarre Test!
of Snake Way! King Kai's Bizarre Test!
Snake Way! King Kai's Bizarre Test!

title: The End of Snake Way! King Kai's Bizarre Test!

description: Piccolo is resurrected and ready to rumble, but his arrival is delayed by an encounter with a dying Namekian. Meanwhile, Vegeta prepares to throw down with Frieza, but the Saiyan prince may be badly over-matched.

input: A Nightmare Transformation! Frieza's Power Level: One-Million?!
Nightmare Transformation! Frieza's Power Level: One-Million?!

title: A Nightmare Transformation! Frieza's Power Level: One-Million?!

description: Goku and Gohan continue their Super Saiyan training, and Trunks finds out the hard way that boosting his power to the next level won't stop Cell. The situation looks bleak until the monster throws down a challenge!

input: The Strongest Super Saiyan! Trunks' Power Unleashed!
Strongest Super Saiyan! Trunks' Power Unleashed!

title: The Strongest Super Saiyan! Trunks' Power Unleashed!

description: Vegeta unleashes an awesome attack that leaves Cell shorthanded, but the monster responds with a brutal beat down, knocking the Saiyan prince unconscious and clearing the way for Trunks to enter the fight!

input: Vegeta's Final Push! Defeat the Invincible Cell!
Final Push! Defeat the Invincible Cell!

title: Vegeta's Final Push! Defeat the Invincible Cell!

description: Goku and his body are reunited, but the noble Saiyan is severely injured and unable to fight. A Namekian messenger rushes to assist Gohan and Krillin in summoning Shenron, but there's no guarantee he'll arrive before Frieza.
title: Goku's Comeback! Call Forth Porunga!

description: Vegeta has been defeated, but there's no time to celebrate. The Z-Fighters must find a way to resurrect the friends who died stopping the Saiyan invasion. Fortunately for the fallen, Krillin has a plan!

input: Dawn of a Fierce Battle! The Star of Hope is Piccolo's Homeland!
of a Fierce Battle! The Star of Hope is Piccolo's Homeland!
a Fierce Battle! The Star of Hope is Piccolo's Homeland!
Fierce Battle! The Star of Hope is Piccolo's Homeland!
Battle! The Star of Hope is Piccolo's Homeland!
The Star of Hope is Piccolo's Homeland!
Star of Hope is Piccolo's Homeland!

title: Dawn of a Fierce Battle! The Star of Hope is Piccolo's Homeland!

description: Vegeta can't handle the fury of Goku's triple Kaio-Ken technique, so the Saiyan warlord unleashes his inner ape. Weakened by his furious onslaught, Goku's only hope to defeat the beast is the mighty Spirit Bomb!

input: An All-Out Kamehame-Ha! Vegeta's Terrible Transformation!

title: An All-Out Kamehame-Ha! Vegeta's Terrible Transformation!

description: Goku and Cell put on an amazing display of ferocious fighting! The monster makes things more interesting by blowing up the ring, and Goku responds with a devastating Kamehameha Wave!

input: Battle at the Highest Level! Goku Goes All Out!
at the Highest Level! Goku Goes All Out!
the Highest Level! Goku Goes All Out!
Highest Level! Goku Goes All Out!

title: Battle at the Highest Level! Goku Goes All Out!

description: Frieza has begun his ultimate transformation, and Vegeta's only hope to defeat the monster is suffering a mortal wound. If the Saiyan warrior can convince Dende to restore his strength, he may gain the power to defeat his enemy!

input: Frieza's Final Transformation! The Ultimate Nightmare Begins!
Final Transformation! The Ultimate Nightmare Begins!

title: Frieza's Final Transformation! The Ultimate Nightmare Begins!

description: Despite the danger of Namek's impending implosion, Goku continues his battle with Frieza, determined to extract revenge for Krillin's murder. Elsewhere, Gohan tries to locate Bulma before it's too late!

input: Avenge the Fallen, Goku! Countdown to the Planet's Destruction!
the Fallen, Goku! Countdown to the Planet's Destruction!
Fallen, Goku! Countdown to the Planet's Destruction!
Goku! Countdown to the Planet's Destruction!

title: Avenge the Fallen, Goku! Countdown to the Planet's Destruction!

description: When Raditz abducts Gohan and announces his plans to conquer Earth, Goku and Piccolo are forced into an uneasy alliance. The two rivals donÆt trust each other but neither of them can defeat the Saiyan on their own!

input: The Enemy is Goku's Brother?! The Secret of the Mighty Saiyan Warriors!
Enemy is Goku's Brother?! The Secret of the Mighty Saiyan Warriors!
is Goku's Brother?! The Secret of the Mighty Saiyan Warriors!
Goku's Brother?! The Secret of the Mighty Saiyan Warriors!
Brother?! The Secret of the Mighty Saiyan Warriors!
The Secret of the Mighty Saiyan Warriors!
Secret of the Mighty Saiyan Warriors!

title: The Enemy is Goku's Brother?! The Secret of the Mighty Saiyan Warriors!

description: Piccolo tries to toughen up Gohan with some wilderness survival training, but things get hairy when the young Saiyan sees his first full moon! Meanwhile, Yajirobe summons Earth's strongest fighters to Kami's Lookout.

input: Wilderness Survival! A Moonlit Night Awakens Gohan!
Survival! A Moonlit Night Awakens Gohan!

title: Wilderness Survival! A Moonlit Night Awakens Gohan!

description: Despite the fury of their attacks, Goku and Piccolo are unable to land a death blow in their battle against Raditz. GohanÆs unexpected outburst manages to weaken the powerful Saiyan, but it may be too little, too late.

input: A Life or Death Battle! Goku and Piccolo's Desperate Attack!
Life or Death Battle! Goku and Piccolo's Desperate Attack!
or Death Battle! Goku and Piccolo's Desperate Attack!
Death Battle! Goku and Piccolo's Desperate Attack!
Battle! Goku and Piccolo's Desperate Attack!

title: A Life or Death Battle! Goku and Piccolo's Desperate Attack!

description: Vegeta gives his increased power and speed a test run by launching a violent attack on Frieza, but no matter how furiously he fights, the Saiyan is unable to penetrate his enemy's defenses!

input: The Moment of Truth Approaches! Goku Back in Action!
Moment of Truth Approaches! Goku Back in Action!
of Truth Approaches! Goku Back in Action!
Truth Approaches! Goku Back in Action!

title: The Moment of Truth Approaches! Goku Back in Action!

description: King Kai telepathically "phones" Goku with a warning to stay as far away from Frieza as possible! Back on Namek, Vegeta is shocked to discover how much a simple transformation can increase Zarbon's power.
title: Friends Reborn! Zarbon's Hideous Transformation!

description: The bruises are multiplying as Goku and Frieza continue to pummel each other mercilessly! Meanwhile, Bulma's encounter with an unusual frog leads to an out-of-body experience!

input: A Boundary-Pushing Brawl! Goku, Frieza, and Ginyu Again?!
Boundary-Pushing Brawl! Goku, Frieza, and Ginyu Again?!
Brawl! Goku, Frieza, and Ginyu Again?!

title: A Boundary-Pushing Brawl! Goku, Frieza, and Ginyu Again?!

description: Goku tries to pulverize the Androids with a devastating display of his Super Saiyan strength, but a mysterious ailment prevents the mighty warrior from unleashing his true power!

input: The Unbeatable Enemy Within! Goku vs. Android 19!
Unbeatable Enemy Within! Goku vs. Android 19!

title: The Unbeatable Enemy Within! Goku vs. Android 19!

description: Piccolo joins the battle in progress and quickly attacks Frieza with the strength of two Namekian warriors. The powerful villain is caught off guard, but a second transformation gives him the strength to finish the fight once and for all!
title: Piccolo Reborn! Frieza's Second Transformation!

description: Goku tells the amazing story of how he survived the destruction of Namek, and the heroic warriors begin their training for a looming showdown with the Androids!

input: Goku's New Move, Instant Transmission! The Three-Year Training Session Begins!
New Move, Instant Transmission! The Three-Year Training Session Begins!
Move, Instant Transmission! The Three-Year Training Session Begins!
Instant Transmission! The Three-Year Training Session Begins!
Transmission! The Three-Year Training Session Begins!

title: Goku's New Move, Instant Transmission! The Three-Year Training Session Begins!

description: A bad case of space boredom makes Bulma a pain to share close quarters with, and Vegeta recovers from his injuries only to discover that Frieza has a head start on tracking down the magic Dragon Balls!

input: A Powerful New Foe! Frieza, Ruler of the Universe!
Powerful New Foe! Frieza, Ruler of the Universe!
New Foe! Frieza, Ruler of the Universe!
Foe! Frieza, Ruler of the Universe!

title: A Powerful New Foe! Frieza, Ruler of the Universe!

description: The stage is set for a final showdown between Vegeta and Goku. The Saiyan Prince is stronger, faster, and far more ruthless. Goku's only hope for victory is a technique that may very well destroy him!

input: The Power of the Kaio-Ken! Goku vs. Vegeta!
Power of the Kaio-Ken! Goku vs. Vegeta!
of the Kaio-Ken! Goku vs. Vegeta!

title: The Power of the Kaio-Ken! Goku vs. Vegeta!

description: Gohan and Krillin unearth the Dragon Balls, but their attempts to summon Shenron fail miserably. Later, Captain Ginyu's devious strategy forces Earth's warriors to do the unthinkable: attack Goku's flesh and bones with chilling ferocity!

input: Surprise! Goku is Ginyu and Ginyu is Goku?!
Goku is Ginyu and Ginyu is Goku?!
is Ginyu and Ginyu is Goku?!

title: Surprise! Goku is Ginyu and Ginyu is Goku?!

description: The Saiyans have arrived, Goku isn't even on the planet, and the over-matched Z-Fighters represent Earth's last line of defense. When Vegeta and Nappa unleash the gruesome Saibamen, Yamcha picks a fight that could be his last!
title: Yamcha's Struggle! The Terrible Saibamen!

description: Desperate to help Android 18 escape, Tien places his own life at risk in an unwinnable battle with the monster Cell. When the three-eyed warrior's power quickly fades, he'll need a lift from a friend to avoid a gruesome end!

input: Tien’s Desperate Attack! Save Your Friends, Goku!
Desperate Attack! Save Your Friends, Goku!

title: Tien’s Desperate Attack! Save Your Friends, Goku!

description: Now that he's dead, Goku must fight to survive in the afterlife, especially during his treacherous trek down Snake Way. Back on Earth, Gohan endures his own punishment as a student in the house of Piccolo!

input: Run in the Afterlife, Goku! The One Million Mile Snake Way!
in the Afterlife, Goku! The One Million Mile Snake Way!
the Afterlife, Goku! The One Million Mile Snake Way!
Afterlife, Goku! The One Million Mile Snake Way!
Goku! The One Million Mile Snake Way!
The One Million Mile Snake Way!

title: Run in the Afterlife, Goku! The One Million Mile Snake Way!

description: After easily defeating Dodoria, Vegeta begins his violent search for the two remaining Dragon Balls. Meanwhile, Krillin and his new friend Dende set out to warn the eldest Namekian of the horror headed his way!

input: Vegeta's Covert Maneuvers! A Tragic Assault on the Namekians!
Covert Maneuvers! A Tragic Assault on the Namekians!
Maneuvers! A Tragic Assault on the Namekians!
A Tragic Assault on the Namekians!

title: Vegeta's Covert Maneuvers! A Tragic Assault on the Namekians!

description: Vegeta is impressed by Gohan's furious outburst after Frieza strikes a death blow against Krillin. The two Saiyans work together to defeat the monster, but even their combined powers won't be enough spare their lives!

input: Frieza Bares His Fangs! Gohan's Overwhelming Attack!
Bares His Fangs! Gohan's Overwhelming Attack!

title: Frieza Bares His Fangs! Gohan's Overwhelming Attack!

description: Gohan and Krillin fight to survive against Guldo, a member of the Ginyu Force who possesses awesome psychic abilities! With Goku still in space and Vegeta their only ally, things look bleak for Earth's heroes.

input: First Up for the Ginyu Force! Guldo's Time Freeze!
Up for the Ginyu Force! Guldo's Time Freeze!
for the Ginyu Force! Guldo's Time Freeze!
the Ginyu Force! Guldo's Time Freeze!

title: First Up for the Ginyu Force! Guldo's Time Freeze!

description: As Goku lies exhausted and vulnerable on the field of battle, Gohan and Krillin take aim at Vegeta's only weakness: his tail! If they can take the ape out of the fight, they might have a chance to escape with their lives.

input: Goku on the Ropes! Pin Your Hopes on the Spirit Bomb!
on the Ropes! Pin Your Hopes on the Spirit Bomb!
the Ropes! Pin Your Hopes on the Spirit Bomb!
Ropes! Pin Your Hopes on the Spirit Bomb!
Pin Your Hopes on the Spirit Bomb!
Your Hopes on the Spirit Bomb!

title: Goku on the Ropes! Pin Your Hopes on the Spirit Bomb!

description: Gohan succeeds in defeating Cell but the monster has one last trick up his sleeve, a devastating development that could destroy the world! For the sake of the future, Goku must prepare himself for the ultimate sacrifice!

input: A Hero's Sacrifice! Last Chance to Save the World!
Hero's Sacrifice! Last Chance to Save the World!
Sacrifice! Last Chance to Save the World!
Last Chance to Save the World!

title: A Hero's Sacrifice! Last Chance to Save the World!

description: Vegeta ramps his battle power up to impressive levels, but he's still no match for the Ginyu goons. To escape death, he'll need help from some heroic former enemies. Meanwhile, Frieza tries to unlock the magic of the Dragon Balls!

input: The Nightmare Recoome! Come Out and Play, Vegeta!
Nightmare Recoome! Come Out and Play, Vegeta!
Recoome! Come Out and Play, Vegeta!

title: The Nightmare Recoome! Come Out and Play, Vegeta!

description: Goku arrives in time to save Gohan and Krillin, and the resurrected warrior is eager to put the hurt on Nappa. When it becomes clear that Goku is no ordinary fighter, Prince Vegeta steps in to finish the fight himself!
title: Farewell, Piccolo! Goku's Furious Counterattack!

description: Cell reveals the full force of his true power, but Gohan refuses to flinch in the face of danger. As the momentum swings to the Saiyan side, Goku calls for his son to deliver the final blow!

input: Perfection's End! A Fury Beyond Super Saiyan!
End! A Fury Beyond Super Saiyan!

title: Perfection's End! A Fury Beyond Super Saiyan!

description: After suffering a savage beating at the hands of Frieza, Goku summons the awesome power of the Kaio-Ken! If his desperate attack succeeds, victory will be his, but if it fails, the Saiyan race will be eliminated!

input: Kaio-ken Times Twenty! An All-Or-Nothing Kamehame-Ha!

title: Kaio-ken Times Twenty! An All-Or-Nothing Kamehame-Ha!

description: Goku and his friends eagerly await the arrival of the Androids, but Yamcha's confrontation with the mechanized monsters suggests that Earth's heroes may be up against more muscle they can handle!
title: Undetectable Monsters! The Androids Appear!

description: While Gohan races to save Piccolo, Goku inflicts a Super-Saiyan beating on Frieza. The blonde brawler's impressive new powers drive his opponent to a desperate counterattack that could obliterate Namek!

input: The Angry Super Saiyan! Goku Throws Down the Gauntlet!
Angry Super Saiyan! Goku Throws Down the Gauntlet!
Super Saiyan! Goku Throws Down the Gauntlet!
Saiyan! Goku Throws Down the Gauntlet!

title: The Angry Super Saiyan! Goku Throws Down the Gauntlet!

description: Preparations for the journey to Namek hit a snag when Bulma accidentally blows up the remaining Saiyan spaceship. Mr. Popo may know of another vessel, so he and Bulma travel to the Earth's end for a closer look.

input: The Ship Resting in Yunzabit! Time to Blast Off for Planet Namek!
Ship Resting in Yunzabit! Time to Blast Off for Planet Namek!
Resting in Yunzabit! Time to Blast Off for Planet Namek!
in Yunzabit! Time to Blast Off for Planet Namek!
Yunzabit! Time to Blast Off for Planet Namek!
Time to Blast Off for Planet Namek!
to Blast Off for Planet Namek!

title: The Ship Resting in Yunzabit! Time to Blast Off for Planet Namek!

description: Goku's training under King Kai is finally complete, and he's eager to return to Earth. Master Roshi uses the Dragon Balls to summon Shenron, but will Goku make it back in time to stop the Saiyans?

input: Shenron Appears! The Saiyans Arrive Sooner than Expected!
Appears! The Saiyans Arrive Sooner than Expected!
The Saiyans Arrive Sooner than Expected!

title: Shenron Appears! The Saiyans Arrive Sooner than Expected!

description: While Piccolo and company search for Dr. Gero's secret laboratory, Vegeta sets out to hunt down and destroy Android 20. Meanwhile, Trunks tries everything in his power to save his stubborn father!

input: The Hunt for Doctor Gero! Discover the Hidden Laboratory!
Hunt for Doctor Gero! Discover the Hidden Laboratory!
for Doctor Gero! Discover the Hidden Laboratory!
Doctor Gero! Discover the Hidden Laboratory!

title: The Hunt for Doctor Gero! Discover the Hidden Laboratory!

description: Gohan uses the pain of past failures to make a Super Saiyan breakthrough, and Vegeta is shocked to find he's no match for Cell's formidable perfect form!

input: The Tables Are Turned! Witness the Power of Perfection!
Tables Are Turned! Witness the Power of Perfection!
Are Turned! Witness the Power of Perfection!
Turned! Witness the Power of Perfection!

title: The Tables Are Turned! Witness the Power of Perfection!

description: With the help of his friends, Goku succeeds in blasting Frieza with a gargantuan Spirit Bomb! Victory seems assured, but when the monster re-emerges to strike a shockingly fatal blow - Goku undergoes a powerful transformation!

input: Awaken, Legendary Warrior! Goku the Super Saiyan!
Legendary Warrior! Goku the Super Saiyan!

title: Awaken, Legendary Warrior! Goku the Super Saiyan!

description: Goku and Frieza go head to head in a vicious slugfest that threatens to destroy the planet of Namek. Krillin and Gohan are amazed by the brutality of the battle, but Piccolo believes two warriors are just warming up!

input: Goku vs. Frieza! The Super Showdown Begins!
vs. Frieza! The Super Showdown Begins!

title: Goku vs. Frieza! The Super Showdown Begins!
